case_title: TSUJIMURA, JURI et al vs. WOOD, BRANDT J. et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER EXTENDING TIME TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON COMPLAINT STATUS CONFERENCE CONTINUED TO 5/6/94. PLTF SHALL NOTIFY DEFENDANT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSUJIMURA, JURI TSUJIMURA, JYOJI TIME TO FILE EXTENDED UNTIL MAR-04-1994

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-06-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAY-06-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUN-06-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSUJIMURA, JURI TSUJIMURA, JYOJI AS TO DEFENDANT WOOD, BRANDT J. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-07-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-04-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-15-1994
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-07-1994, CONTINUED TO MAY-06-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
